Explanation: The report effectively communicates a structured analysis of chromatography data with clear methodology and honest acknowledgment of limitations. Strengths include transparent discussion of data integrity issues (volume offsets, >60% missingness), appropriate methodological choices (AsLS baseline correction, weighted peak area calculations), and well-organized presentation. However, several limitations reduce the overall impact: (1) Visuals are severely underdeveloped—Figure 1 appears incomplete with only a single run shown and blank space, significantly weakening data communication; (2) Depth is compromised by the high missingness preventing correlation analysis, though this is appropriately acknowledged; (3) The analysis lacks discussion of why R32 and R30 achieved higher yields or alternative explanations; (4) No sensitivity analysis on baseline correction parameters or weighting strategies is provided. Writing quality is good with minor issues (¿60% notation inconsistent). The scientific approach is sound in principle but incomplete in execution, particularly regarding robustness checks and alternative interpretations.
